title: Senator Ron Johnson on the Senate showdown over Trump's Big Beautiful Bill | All-In Interview
description:
(0:00) Friedberg and Chamath welcome Senator Ron Johnson

(2:30) The Reconciliation Bill process, how much the Big, Beautiful Bill will add to the national debt

(14:33) Problems with growing our way out of debt, why elected officials are avoiding the fiscal reality

(24:53) Energy rescissions, future of DOGE

(32:09) How Senator Johnson will force a real review of the Big, Beautiful Bill; future of MAGA and the Conservative movement

(54:15) Next steps if the Big, Beautiful Bill passes

(58:35) Post-interview recap

analysis.summary: The All-In Podcast features Senator Ron Johnson discussing the Senate showdown over Trump's Big Beautiful Bill, the national debt, and the future of the Conservative movement. Senator Johnson shares his concerns about the bill's impact on the national debt and his plans to force a review of the bill. The conversation also touches on energy rescissions, the future of DOGE, and the next steps if the bill passes.

takeaways.text: The Big Beautiful Bill will add to the national debt
Elected officials are avoiding the fiscal reality
Senator Johnson will force a review of the bill
The future of DOGE is uncertain
The Conservative movement is at a crossroads
The next steps if the bill passes are unclear

sentiment.notes: The conversation is cautious and concerned about the impact of the Big Beautiful Bill on the national debt and the future of the Conservative movement.

notable_moments.description: Senator Johnson discusses his plan to force a review of the bill
The next steps if the bill passes are discussed
